name: 10 New Insights in Climate Science
description: Annual publication led by Future Earth Sweden Hub synthesising the most critical new findings in climate science. Led by Erik Pihl at Royal Swedish Academy of Sciences.

name: AERTH Planetary AI
description: AI-driven predictive platform functioning as a dynamic digital twin of Earth. Connects on-ground research with satellite observations. Blockchain-secured data sharing with bounty system for scenario modelling.
imageAlt: Planetary landscape monitored by AERTH AI

name: Biocultural Jaguar Credits
description: Indigenous-led conservation credit program in Brazil and Latin America, developed with Fundacion Pachamama and the Sharamentsa Achuar community.

name: CityCatalyst
description: Machine learning platform analysing satellite imagery for GHG emissions, empowering lower-resource cities to track and reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

name: DestinE Climate Change Adaptation Digital Twin
description: Multidecadal climate simulation digital twin built by ECMWF as part of EU Destination Earth initiative. Allows interactive testing of adaptation strategies.
imageAlt: Destination Earth digital twin of the planet

name: DestinE Weather-Induced Extremes Digital Twin
description: High-resolution weather forecasting digital twin for floods and droughts, built by ECMWF.

name: Elysium Life
description: Immersive theatre experience in Stockholm disguised as a transcendence clinic. Visitors surrender phones, don robes, and undergo a multi-step experiential journey exploring beauty, transformation, and escapism. Created by a character called Hades. Frames beauty as a right, not a luxury — blending salon aesthetics with mythological narrative.

name: Exponential Roadmap
description: Reports translating complex climate data into actionable insights for halving global emissions every decade.

name: Finnish Citizens' Parliament 2023
description: Landmark deliberative democratic experiment bringing over 600 randomly selected Finns to deliberate on citizens' initiatives using Deliberative Poll methodology

name: Genius Platform (VERSES AI)
description: AI platform using active inference (Karl Friston's Free Energy Principle) to create context-aware AI systems. Demonstrated cross-platform digital twin interoperability with NASA JPL for lunar rover simulation.

name: IEEE P2874 Spatial Web Standards
description: Open IEEE standards for the Spatial Web including HSML (Hyperspatial Modeling Language) and HSTP (Hyperspatial Transaction Protocol). Standardized May 2025. Makes physical space programmable.
imageAlt: VERSES AI system visualization for spatial computing

name: Kolektivo Curacao
description: Island-scale pilot implementing CuraDAI local stablecoin, tokenised food forests, and ecological UBI. Participants earn CuraDAI by contributing to social and ecological projects like beach cleanups and planting food forests.

name: Ningaloo Reef Digital Twin
description: Digital twin of Ningaloo Reef developed with UWA Oceans Institute and NASA JPL. Flagship demonstration of AERTH platform.

name: Nordic Deliberation
description: Pan-Nordic alliance of four democracy organizations aimed at scaling deliberative democracy across the Nordic countries

name: Nordic Network for Regenerative Agriculture
description: Peer-to-peer learning network among farmers, sheepherders, and agricultural professionals across the Nordic region, advocating for practices that increase soil fertility, carbon sequestration, and active microbiology

name: OpenClimate
description: Nested carbon accounting system with high verifiability to enable actions limiting global warming to 1.5C. Federated data commons incorporating subnational data into global commons.

name: Planetary Guardians Protocol
description: Ostrom-based regenerative governance protocol for landscape-scale ecological stewardship. Base unit is 10m2 pixel of land. Constitutional kernel frozen February 2026.

name: Quadratic Voting (RxC)
description: Mathematical voting tool where voters allocate voice credits quadratically to issues they care about. Proven in Taiwanese Presidential Hackathon and Colorado state budget allocations.

name: RFCx Arbimon Platform
description: Web console platform for long-term biodiversity monitoring using CNNs for species identification from acoustic data. Developed with Microsoft AI for Good.
imageAlt: Natural landscape monitored by Arbimon biodiversity platform

name: RFCx Guardian System
description: Autonomous solar-powered listening devices made from recycled smartphones, installed in rainforest canopies to detect chainsaws, gunshots, and vehicles in real-time for anti-poaching and anti-logging.
imageAlt: Rainforest canopy with Guardian acoustic monitoring system

name: Regen Civics Alliance
description: Alliance piloting 13 place-based regenerative development projects globally (eco-villages, food forests) equipped with Hypha DAO tools for local governance and cooperative business models.

name: Regen Ledger
description: Domain-specific public Cosmos blockchain for ecological regeneration. Supports ecological crediting protocols, ecocredit trading, and AI-driven measurement with peer-reviewed Ecological State Protocols.

name: SEEDS Regenerative Currency
description: Regenerative currency ecosystem on Telos blockchain. Evolved into Hypha DAO Organization-in-a-Box solutions.
imageAlt: Hypha platform supporting SEEDS regenerative economy

name: Self-Owning Nature Trusts
description: Alternative property configuration enabling nature to buy ownerless land for ecosystem preservation. Part of Dark Matter Labs' Property & Beyond lab.
imageAlt: Dark Matter Labs property and nature trust visualization

name: Smart Covenants
description: Platform leveraging smart contracts and distributed ledgers to democratise public investment and recapture land value uplift generated by sustainable infrastructure. Developed with EIT Climate-KIC.

name: Strawbees Sustainability Station
description: Educational programme aligning with UN SDGs, challenging students to design wind turbines, hurricane-resistant architecture, and assistive medical devices using physical prototyping tools.
imageAlt: Students building with Strawbees in classroom

name: Swedish Citizens' Assembly on Climate
description: Historic national climate assembly (Medborgarrad om klimatet) convened spring 2024 to generate policy proposals on reducing national greenhouse gas emissions through nine hybrid meetings

name: Top 50 Farmers (T50F)
description: Platform placing regenerative farmers at center of food value chain, connecting them with investors, markets, and peer-mentoring networks through storytelling to shift cultural perceptions around food production

name: handlingar.se
description: Open-source Freedom of Information platform that automates and publishes requests for public documents from Swedish authorities
